description: Add improved empty states for kanban: no customers, no selection, and no boards

asi.kanban_empty_states: Three-tier empty state: 1) No customers - show create customer button, 2) Customers exist but none selected - prompt to select, 3) Customer selected but no boards - show create board button

description: Hide 'Create new board' option in dropdown when no customers exist

asi.kanban_create_board: The 'Create new board' CommandItem in the board dropdown is now conditionally rendered only when customers.length > 0
